# cloudflare_zero_trust_dlp_data_tag (Resource)

Accepted Permissions

- `Zero Trust Read`
- `Zero Trust Write`

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cloudflare_zero_trust_dlp_data_tag" "example_zero_trust_dlp_data_tag" {
  account_id = "account_id"
  category_id = "182bd5e5-6e1a-4fe4-a799-aa6d9a6ab26e"
  name = "name"
  description = "description"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `account_id` (String)
- `category_id` (String)
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
$ terraform import cloudflare_zero_trust_dlp_data_tag.example '<account_id>/<category_id>/<tag_id>'
```
